title: upgrade-conflict-report
outOfScope: Changing the template release publication process.
Resolving project-owned conflicts automatically without confirmation.

sources.reason: Current upgrade conflict preservation behavior and entrypoint.
Existing human decision gate integration point.

riskAssessment.reason: Upgrade decisions must be visible and fail closed when a project-owned or diverged file needs human input.

executionDecision.reason: User authorized the approved implementation loop; conflict resolution itself remains fail-closed for human confirmation.

preReviewWarnings: Review report completeness, classification accuracy, and confirmation-gate behavior.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: Upgrade conflict reports classify Template-owned, Project-owned, Diverged, and Human Confirmation Required files with actionable summaries.
Upgrade application fails closed when a report contains unresolved human confirmation items.
Installer, preflight, and adoption end-to-end tests cover missing reports, invalid ownership, and unconfirmed continuation.
Upgrade documentation explains report output and the confirmation gate.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented in the upgrade reference.
Conflict classification must preserve project-owned files and never silently overwrite diverged content.

intent.problem: Upgrade currently records preservation decisions but does not provide a durable, human-readable report for all ownership and divergence cases.
constraints: Keep upgrades fail-closed for unresolved human decisions.
Do not overwrite project-owned or diverged files automatically.
Keep the implementation compatible with the existing installer and Work Item gates.
intent.rationale: A structured report makes upgrade behavior reviewable and gives adopters an explicit decision point before applying risky changes.

scenarioCoverage.reason: Verify with installer and adoption tests.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Project-owned or diverged file is detected
scenarioCoverage.reason: Verify report classification and confirmation gate.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Report is missing or ownership data is invalid
scenarioCoverage.reason: Verify fail-closed behavior with preflight and adoption tests.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User authorized the full approved implementation loop, including required governance complexity threshold maintenance.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
